creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
The URL:

	   * http://www.nl.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr-summary.cgi

	Displays the source of the CGI script instead of the result of that
script. Perhaps the whole server is configured differently, so that CGI
scripts are not executed, but rather displayed.

Fix: 

Perhaps reconfig Apache on that host.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Go there.
